scenario:
INVITE sip:[field1]@[field3] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sip:[field0]@[field2];tag=[call_number] To: sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 INVITE Contact: sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=TCP Supported: replaces Max-Forwards: 70 Subject: Performance Test User-to-User: 00FA080001001056965CFB;encoding=hex Require: sdp-anat Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=sips:66074001@20.20.64.86 9 2 IN IP4 10.133.67.145 s=- b=TIAS:64000 t=0 0 a=activetalker:1 a=group:ANAT 1 2 m=audio 35196 RTP/AVP 116 9 8 0 110 18 120 c=IN IP4 10.133.67.145 a=sendrecv a=rtpmap:116 OPUS/48000/2 a=fmtp:116 maxplaybackrate=16000;sprop-maxcapturerate=16000;maxaveragebitrate=20000;stereo=0;sprop-stereo=0;cbr=0;useinbandfec=1;usedtx=0 a=minptime:20 a=maxptime:20 a=rtpmap:9 G722/8000/1 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000/1 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000/1 a=rtpmap:110 G726-32/8000/1 a=rtpmap:18 G729/8000/1 a=rtpmap:120 telephone-event/8000 a=ptime:20 a=tcap:1 RTP/SAVP a=acap:1 crypto:1 AES_256_CM_HMAC_SHA1_80 inline:vT68GUlfbcWUIkrNaWgIDjyATf92lzIi38PdZzR34ukPtIwrdkuQt6Cetn16Fg== UNENCRYPTED_SRTCP a=acap:2 crypto:2 AES_CM_128_HMAC_SHA1_80 inline:Yob4tpzO4S4PrSzo1KVewljvpkr8sZX4/NpfS2b7 UNENCRYPTED_SRTCP a=pcfg:1 t=1 a=1 a=pcfg:2 t=1 a=2 a=mid:1 m=audio 35078 RTP/AVP 116 9 8 0 110 18 120 c=IN IP6 2a07:2a42:adc0:11f::145 a=sendrecv a=rtpmap:116 OPUS/48000/2 a=fmtp:116 maxplaybackrate=16000; sprop-maxcapturerate=16000; maxaveragebitrate=20000; stereo=0; sprop-stereo=0; cbr=0; useinbandfec=1; usedtx=0 a=minptime:20 a=maxptime:20 a=rtpmap:9 G722/8000/1 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000/1 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000/1 a=rtpmap:110 G726-32/8000/1 a=rtpmap:18 G729/8000/1 a=rtpmap:120 telephone-event/8000 a=ptime:20 a=tcap:1 RTP/SAVP a=acap:1 crypto:1 AES_256_CM_HMAC_SHA1_80 inline:vT68GUlfbcWUIkrNaWgIDjyATf92lzIi38PdZzR34ukPtIwrdkuQt6Cetn16Fg== UNENCRYPTED_SRTCP a=acap:2 crypto:2 AES_CM_128_HMAC_SHA1_80 inline:Yob4tpzO4S4PrSzo1KVewljvpkr8sZX4/NpfS2b7 UNENCRYPTED_SRTCP a=pcfg:1 t=1 a=1 a=pcfg:2 t=1 a=2 a=mid:2

INVITE sip:[field1]@[field3] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sip:[field0]@[field2];tag=[call_number] To: sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 2 INVITE Contact: sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=TCP Supported: replaces Max-Forwards: 70 Subject: Performance Test User-to-User: 00FA080001001056965CFB;encoding=hex Require: sdp-anat Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=- 1578639739 3 IN IP4 10.133.67.25 s=- c=IN IP4 10.133.67.145 b=TIAS:1088000 t=0 0 a=group:ANAT 1 a=group:ANAT 4 a=group:ANAT 5 a=activetalker:1 m=audio 35212 RTP/AVP 0 8 18 9 120 c=IN IP4 10.133.67.145 a=sendrecv a=fmtp:18 annexb=no a=rtpmap:120 telephone-event/8000 a=mid:1 a=tcap:1 RTP/SAVP a=acap:1 crypto:1 AES_256_CM_HMAC_SHA1_80 inline:SXXpbLR7cekkCjGhUV6x0eE7AXYaTnlQlhexCRtsN6FJHIochPHc+AsMC1NwMQ== UNENCRYPTED_SRTCP a=acap:2 crypto:2 AES_CM_128_HMAC_SHA1_80 inline:GQTKL0Z2CErLEGwz0XDvIBvMhRN3K8NmalSn8OfB UNENCRYPTED_SRTCP a=pcfg:1 t=1 a=1 a=pcfg:2 t=1 a=2 a=minptime:20 m=audio 0 RTP/AVP 0 c=IN IP6 :: a=inactive a=mid:2 m=video 35226 RTP/AVP 100 98 c=IN IP4 10.133.67.145 b=TIAS:1024000 a=sendrecv a=rtpmap:100 H264/90000 a=fmtp:100 profile-level-id=640c1f;packetization-mode=1 a=rtpmap:98 H264/90000 a=fmtp:98 profile-level-id=42401f a=content:main a=label:11 a=mid:4 a=tcap:2 RTP/SAVP a=acap:3 crypto:1 AES_256_CM_HMAC_SHA1_80 inline:yfCHoBNLnCnZC4is6vablhuAk6/shEgC42tC9IsQrg0OvDcof0bF4LVEx+TFJQ== UNENCRYPTED_SRTCP a=acap:4 crypto:2 AES_CM_128_HMAC_SHA1_80 inline:TRJK3rppImwPbA6gSOfoArG2DU7eGL1/6F692OhV UNENCRYPTED_SRTCP a=pcfg:1 t=2 a=3 a=pcfg:2 t=2 a=4 a=rtcp-fb:* ccm fir a=rtcp-fb:* nack pli a=rtcp-fb:* ccm tmmbr m=application 35228 UDP/BFCP * c=IN IP4 10.133.67.145 a=sendrecv a=connection:new a=setup:actpass a=floorctrl:c-only a=mid:5
